search.query: | tstats `summariesonly` values(congestion.counterName) as counterName from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.congestion | mvexpand counterName

| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.congestion by congestion.nd_host, congestion.counterName | rename congestion.* as * | search counterName=$counter_tkn$ | table nd_host | dedup nd_host

| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.congestion by congestion.fabricName, congestion.counterName | rename congestion.* as * | search counterName=$counter_tkn$ | table fabricName | dedup fabricName

| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.congestion by congestion.switchName, congestion.counterName | rename congestion.* as * | search counterName=$counter_tkn$ | table switchName | dedup switchName

| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.congestion by congestion.interfaceName, congestion.counterName | rename congestion.* as * | search counterName=$counter_tkn$ | table interfaceName | dedup interfaceName

| tstats `summariesonly` values(congestion.ts) as ts from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.congestion by congestion.ts, congestion.counterName, congestion.nd_host, congestion.fabricName, congestion.switchName, congestion.interfaceName, congestion.event_value | rename congestion.* as * | table counterName nd_host fabricName ts event_value switchName interfaceName | search counterName="$counter_tkn$" fabricName="$fabric_tkn$" nd_host="$host_tkn$" switchName="$switch_tkn$" interfaceName="$interface_tkn$" | rename ts as Timestamp | chart values(event_value) AS Value by Timestamp

| tstats `summariesonly` values(congestion.ts) as ts from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.congestion by congestion.ts, congestion.counterName, congestion.nd_host, congestion.fabricName, congestion.switchName, congestion.interfaceName, congestion.event_value | rename congestion.* as * | table counterName nd_host fabricName ts event_value switchName interfaceName | search counterName="$counter_tkn$" fabricName="$fabric_tkn$" nd_host="$host_tkn$" switchName="$switch_tkn$" interfaceName="$interface_tkn$" | stats max(event_value)

| tstats `summariesonly` values(congestion.ts) as ts from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.congestion by congestion.ts, congestion.counterName, congestion.nd_host, congestion.fabricName, congestion.switchName, congestion.interfaceName, congestion.event_value | rename congestion.* as * | table counterName nd_host fabricName ts event_value switchName interfaceName | search counterName="$counter_tkn$" fabricName="$fabric_tkn$" nd_host="$host_tkn$" switchName="$switch_tkn$" interfaceName="$interface_tkn$" | stats min(event_value)

| tstats `summariesonly` values(congestion.ts) as ts from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.congestion by congestion.ts, congestion.counterName, congestion.nd_host, congestion.fabricName, congestion.switchName, congestion.interfaceName, congestion.event_value | rename congestion.* as * | table counterName nd_host fabricName ts event_value switchName interfaceName | search counterName="$counter_tkn$" fabricName="$fabric_tkn$" nd_host="$host_tkn$" switchName="$switch_tkn$" interfaceName="$interface_tkn$" | stats avg(event_value)

| tstats `summariesonly` values(congestion.ts) as ts from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.congestion by congestion.ts, congestion.counterName, congestion.nd_host, congestion.fabricName, congestion.switchName, congestion.interfaceName, congestion.event_value | rename congestion.* as * | table counterName nd_host fabricName ts event_value switchName interfaceName | search counterName="$counter_tkn$" fabricName="$fabric_tkn$" nd_host="$host_tkn$" switchName="$switch_tkn$" interfaceName="$interface_tkn$" | rename counterName as "Counter Name" nd_host as "Host" fabricName as "Fabric Name" ts as Timestamp event_value as "Value" switchName as "Switch Name" interfaceName as "Interface Name"
